title: Dungeon Crawl Feed
subtitle: Floor Broadcast // Princess Donut Network
footer: Dungeon management denies responsibility for curses, lava, celebrity felines, emotional damage, or surprise quests.
headline: AI Showrunner Notice
message: Your species demonstrated remarkable tolerance for predatory pricing before the collapse. We saw no reason to discard a successful model.
directive: Work harder, consume less, and try not to bleed without sponsorship.
